name: Silhouette through rear window
purpose: Mood beat. Character implied rather than shown — the shape of authority against Tokyo neon, read through the glass.
midjourney_prompt: silhouette of a mid-20s East Asian woman's head and shoulders seen through the rear window of a black Ferrari F40 from outside the car, Tokyo neon reflections on the glass, jet black collarbone hair with asymmetric strands visible as pure silhouette, no facial detail, anamorphic 2.39:1, crushed blacks, fine grain --ar 21:9 --style raw
nano_banana_2_prompt:
Subject: the silhouette of the same mid-20s East Asian woman from the reference turnaround, seen from outside the car through the rear window of a black Ferrari F40. Only the head and upper shoulders are visible. The distinct collarbone-length jet black hair with two asymmetric face-framing strands is readable as pure silhouette. No facial detail discernible.

Style: mood beat, silhouette cinematography, anamorphic 2.39:1, crushed blacks, fine grain.

Composition: horizontal framing, rear window fills the central two-thirds of the frame, silhouette centered inside the window, F40 rear bodywork visible at bottom edge, engine bay carbon grille visible just below the window.

Lighting: cool Tokyo neon from behind the camera lighting the rear glass with magenta-blue reflections, warm tungsten cabin glow behind the silhouette providing rim light on the hair strands, no direct light on the face.

Background: wet asphalt and neon bokeh reflecting on the rear glass surface, superimposed on the silhouette inside the cabin.

Color palette: silhouette pure black, rear-glass reflections cool magenta-blue, cabin rim light warm tungsten, F40 bodywork crushed black.

Avoid: any facial feature being readable, any brand logo other than the Ferrari crest on the rear grille, any modern Ferrari silhouette, HDR glow.
